items.title: Samosa (Veg)
items.description: Crispy pastry filled with a delicious mix of spiced vegetables. This popular South Asian snack is golden-fried to perfection and full of flavor. Perfect as a light bite or starter, best enjoyed with chutney or your favorite dip.

items.title: Fish Finger (5 pcs)
items.description: Crispy finger fish strips, golden-fried to perfection and served with a creamy dipping sauce—light, crunchy, and packed with flavor.

items.title: Fish &  Chips
items.description: Crispy golden fish fillet served with thick-cut fries, creamy tartar sauce, and a fresh lemon wedge—classic comfort food, perfectly fried and full of flavor.

items.title: Chicken Haleem
items.description: Experience the rich, slow-cooked flavors of Haleem, now making its delicious debut in Tallinn, served perfectly with traditional Plain naan—now available on the Tandoor platform app.

items.title: Special Chicken Biryani
items.description: Authentic South Asian-style biryani made with tender chicken pieces cooked in rich, aromatic spices and layered with premium basmati rice. Each batch is freshly prepared daily for a perfect balance of flavor and aroma. Served with salad and raita for a complete meal experience.

items.title: Chicken Kebab Pizza (30 cm)
items.description: Tomato paste, cheese, chicken kebab, onion, paprika, mix salad, garlic sauce
